results.name: about
results.title: About LocateFlow | LocateFlow
results.h1: LocateFlow is a home-service and moving organization app.
results.visibleTextSample: LocateFlow Sign In Get started ABOUT LocateFlow is a home-service and moving organization app. It gives individuals one place to manage the records that follow an address: utilities, banks, insurance, subscriptions, renewal dates, and moving tasks. What LocateFlow is LocateFlow is built for people who want a reliable list of every service, renewal, and task tied to where they live. It is especially useful before, during, and after a move because address changes tend to scatter across providers,

results.name: account-delete
results.title: Delete your LocateFlow account | LocateFlow
results.visibleTextSample: LocateFlow Sign In Get started ACCOUNT Delete your LocateFlow account You can permanently delete your LocateFlow account and the personal data we hold for you. This page describes the in-app deletion path and the email-based request path for users who cannot access the app. Fastest path: delete from inside the app Open the LocateFlow mobile app or sign in to locateflow.com on the web. Open Settings → Privacy → Delete account. Type the confirmation phrase (DELETE in English, ELIMINAR in Spanish).

results.title: Delete your LocateFlow account | LocateFlow
results.visibleTextSample: LocateFlow Features Why free Pricing Help Blog FAQ Sign In Get started ACCOUNT Delete your LocateFlow account You can permanently delete your LocateFlow account and the personal data we hold for you. This page describes the in-app deletion path and the email-based request path for users who cannot access the app. Fastest path: delete from inside the app Open the LocateFlow mobile app or sign in to locateflow.com on the web.
